text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
So that's what happened—I get it now! Years ago,
on that fateful day, the prankster kaiju was born!
In other words...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: You got that right! Today's the day I go wild!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Awaken! On this happy day, you have been
reborn. Welcome, Sixth Ranger—Nom-Nom
Knight!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
...Naw, that's lame. If I become your ally, then
there'll be nobody for me to bite.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
You foolish creature! Now that it's come to this, I
shall vanquish you with my Birthday Bash.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Here I go! Take my ultimate move—Happy Birthday Attack! Happy birthday! Happy birthday!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: And don't forget my Celebratory Dance Attack!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Now, to finish you off! Finale Present Crash!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Ugh... this role-play could use some work.
